privileged_info_summary: The task targets three real published papers: (1) 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al., 2017, arXiv 1706.03762), (2) 'Generative Adversarial Nets' (Goodfellow et al., 2014, arXiv 1406.2661), and (3) 'Deep Learning' (LeCun, Bengio, Hinton, 2015, Nature vol. 521). The abstracts provided in the task description are authentic excerpts from these published papers. All four keywords for Paper 1 (Transformer, attention mechanism, encoder, decoder) appear in its abstract. All four keywords for Paper 2 (adversarial, generative model, discriminative, minimax) appear in its abstract. All four keywords for Paper 3 (representations, levels of abstraction, backpropagation, processing layers) appear in its abstract. All three abstracts exceed the minimum length requirement of 100 characters (Paper 1: 562 chars, Paper 2: 447 chars, Paper 3: 619 chars). The seed library provides the paper metadata without abstracts, requiring agents to manually add the correct abstracts via the Zotero GUI.
